## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and optimization efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content workflow is producing 50% of impressions and 40% of clicks](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Team to start refreshing underperforming content to improve rankings and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Focus on categorizing content into clusters for better organization and linking](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Importance of tracking engagement metrics and conversions, not just clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [New content workflow producing 50% of impressions and 40% of clicks](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Team using Google Search Console for SEO metrics; suggestion to also utilize Google Analytics for additional insights (e.g., session time, bounce rate)](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Focus on content clusters and workloads to test performance](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Identifying low-performing content with high impressions but low clicks](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Plan to refresh and optimize these articles using insights from high-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Example shared: 5 content refreshes for another client resulted in significant improvements (e.g., average position from 77 to 51, impressions from 252k to 700k per day)](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### SEO Metrics and Tracking

  - [Currently getting 30 clicks per day on blog content](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Team aims to increase to 10 clicks per day from their efforts](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Discussion on tracking engagement metrics beyond clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Importance of monitoring conversions and bounce rates to assess traffic quality](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Categorization and Linking

  - [Using Airtable for content organization and topic clustering](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Ensuring bidirectional linking between new and existing high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [AI-assisted linking process with human oversight for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Suggestion to improve visibility of internal links on the website](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Introduction of new team member, Prateek, with 10 years of SEO experience](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Categorize content into clusters and present in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Implement 5 content refreshes for underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and reporting on SEO metrics, including engagement and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Improve internal linking strategy, especially for high-performing pages like "What is video commerce?"](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Share Airtable access with Akash for content tracking and organization](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Post updates in Slack channel throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/KHP_zq_m6vg-rRZUyErsxPasisdoZyPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
